title: [ImportVerilog] Implement support for `null` literals
body:
This patch adds support for materializing the `null` keyword in System Verilog.

According to IEEE 1800-2023 Table 6-7 the default assignment values of types are defined, and, in the case of `class`, `interface class`, `chandle`, and `virtual interface` default to `null`.

For this reason, this patch introduces `NullType`, a type modelling a null value, and `NullOp`, an operation materializing a `NullType` value. This patch also implements the null literal logic in IEEE 1800-2023 according to Table 6-7.
